changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md with complete copy-paste-ready code for both tasks. Key fix: explicitly instructed NOT to set integral_limit on thermal PI controller. The baseline model was setting integral_limit=max_power (100), which capped the integral accumulator at 100. However, the PI controller needs the integral to reach ~175 to achieve zero steady-state error at the setpoint (22°C with ambient 15°C). Added prominent CRITICAL warning about this. Also provided explicit PID gains for cruise control (Kp=2.0, Ki=0.3, Kd=0.1) and complete simulation loop code for both tasks.
